description_long: This maintenance worker is depicted as a male figure wearing a dark metallic chest plate, forearm guards, and a large, industrial helmet that covers the upper face. He is equipped with a red cylindrical tank strapped horizontally across his back, connected by a hose to his right arm, suggesting the use of pressurized equipment. His attire includes blue work pants and black boots, with a large knife or tool sheathed at his left hip. The arms are protected by metallic bracers, and there is an additional metallic shoulder guard on the left side. The overall appearance suggests a worker involved in hazardous or heavy-duty maintenance, possibly welding or firefighting, with a focus on personal protection and utility.
description: A male maintenance worker in blue pants and black boots, outfitted with a metallic chest plate, helmet, arm guards, and a large red tank on his back, carrying a sheathed tool.
description_view_0: Front view shows the metallic helmet, chest plate, arm guards, and the red tank on the back, with the sheathed tool visible at the hip.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the helmet, the cylindrical tank, and the knife/tool at the hip.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the red tank, the back of the chest plate, and the attachment of the hose.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the hose connection to the arm, the metallic bracers, and the side profile of the helmet and tank.
attribute_uniform_type: industrial work shirt and blue pants with metallic protective armor
